context_text: <A> um so that was really really great so everyone would always just go home for easter or whatever / <B> yeah / <A> and then now um i'm at a different school and we don't get any time off at all for easter / <B> really / <A> and i remember i had class like on good friday and i was thinking you know i really don't wanna go to class like i and i'm sure i probably could've gotten out of it and it probably wouldn't have been a big deal at all but i ended up going after all just 'cause you know it's kind of a pain if you have to miss and especially that late in the semester { i } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> would've gotten behind it was a math class so / <B> yeah
